context_for_next_testing_agent: iter187 fully tested. New features: (1) POST /api/daily-briefing/mint now accepts optional staff_phone field (E.164 format); (2) POST /api/daily-briefing/mint-bulk accepts {rows: [{staff_name, staff_role?, staff_email?, staff_phone?}, ...], ttl_days} with max 200 rows; (3) POST /api/daily-briefing/flush-queue replays queued mobile_briefing entries - returns ok:false when no Resend/Twilio creds set; (4) POST /api/standup/send now includes sms_sent field in mobile_push stats; (5) GET /api/daily-briefing/tokens returns staff_phone field. Frontend: Daily Briefing Admin panel has new phone input (briefing-admin-phone), bulk CSV textarea (briefing-admin-bulk-csv), bulk mint button (briefing-admin-bulk-mint), download CSV button (briefing-admin-bulk-download), flush queue button (briefing-admin-flush). MOCKED: Twilio SMS and Resend email - all paths take graceful queue fallback when keys not set.
